spec_summary: Transform flashcard-only app into structured learning platform. Add /learn path with guided chapters per topic. Each chapter = read notes -> drill cards -> senior insights with progress gates (read, drilled, completed). Home reoriented around continue-learning. Keep existing /review /topic/:slug /mock /stats routes working.

tasks.title: Schema + curriculum loader: add Chapter type, build chapters from flashcards grouped by (topic, subtopic) in src/lib/curriculum.ts. Chapter = { id, topicId, slug, label, cardCount, cardIds, order }. Export loadCurriculum() that returns all topics with their chapters ordered deterministically.

Learn progress store: src/lib/learn-progress.ts with localStorage key 'ipc-learn-progress-v1'. Schema { [chapterId]: { read: boolean, drillRecall: number (0-1), completed: boolean, lastVisited: number, cardsReviewed: number } }. Export loadLearnProgress, markRead, recordDrillRecall, isCompleted, topicProgress(topicId), getLastVisitedChapter. useLearnProgress hook for client components.

Content synthesis utility: src/lib/chapter-content.ts. synthesizeNotes(cards), synthesizeExamples(cards), synthesizeSenior(cards) produce structured sections from flashcards' back/senior_nuance/quote_to_say. Also loadChapterOverrides(topicSlug, chapterSlug) that reads optional content/cs/learn/<topic>/<chapter>/{notes.md, examples.md, senior.md} (server-side, fs). Prefer overrides when present.

/learn index page (src/app/learn/page.tsx): grid of topics with progress bars. Editorial hero 'Learn.' serif italic. Each topic card: emoji, label, accent-tinted progress ring, chapters count, continue CTA (deep-links to last-visited chapter or first pending). Mobile-first + desktop grid. Uses existing glass + topic-glow utilities.

/learn/[topic] page (src/app/learn/[topic]/page.tsx): ordered chapter list. Header: topic emoji + label (accent-tinted), overall progress bar. Each chapter row: number, label, cardCount, progress dots (read/drilled/completed), click to /learn/[topic]/[chapter]. Locked chapters greyed (soft gating). generateStaticParams.

/learn/[topic]/[chapter] page: core chapter experience. Sections: (1) Hero with accent + label + progress ring, (2) Read section: synthesized notes, marks chapter read on scroll, (3) Worked examples (expandable), (4) Drill section with Start drill button -> ChapterDrill, (5) Senior insights list. Prev/next chapter nav. generateStaticParams.

Sidebar + home refactor. side-nav.tsx: add Learn link (BookOpen icon). Home page: Daily review CTA + Continue learning card (last-visited chapter) + Topics grid (linking to /learn/[topic]) + Mock/All cards quick actions. bottom-nav.tsx: add Learn.

ChapterDrill client component (src/components/chapter-drill.tsx): lean wrapper around FlashcardViewer. Receives chapterId + cards. Tracks session ratings, on finish computes recall = (good+easy + hard*0.5)/total, calls recordDrillRecall. Mini progress UI. Do NOT reuse full CardDeck (too many filters); lean component leveraging FlashcardViewer + SRS hooks.

Build + biome + smoke test. Run `bunx biome check --write .` and `bun run build`. Fix errors. Start dev server briefly, curl /, /learn, /learn/algos, /learn/algos/<first-chapter>, /review, /topic/algos, /mock, /stats for 200 status. Commit.

decisions.decision: Chapters = subtopic groupings. Each JSON file in content/cs/flashcards/<topic>/ maps to one chapter since subtopic values are uniform per file.
decisions.why: Zero extra authoring. Automatic chapter discovery from existing content.

decisions.decision: Notes/examples/senior synthesized at runtime from flashcards. Optional .md overrides in content/cs/learn/.
decisions.why: Lean content pipeline. User can drop override files incrementally.

decisions.decision: Soft gating (greyed but navigable) instead of hard lock.
Keep existing /topic/:slug and /review routes intact. Learn is additive.
